title: T-62 Performance Scalability — fast-cache-validation inversion fix
summary: Fix the inverted fast-cache-validation branch in ensure_ast_cache so fast_cache_validation=True uses the cheap validation path.
acceptance_criteria: fast_cache_validation=True calls cache.validate(cached, fast=True) — not fast=False.
Two new regression tests prove the fast=True and fast=False contracts explicitly.
Ruff and Pyright clean on touched files.
